auth_notes: Requires an API key generated via Google AI Studio. The key is passed as a query parameter (key=API_KEY) or via the 'x-goog-api-key' header.
rate_limits: Free tier: 15 RPM (Requests Per Minute), 1 million TPM (Tokens Per Minute), 1,500 RPD (Requests Per Day). Paid tiers offer higher throughput.
gotchas: Strict safety filters may block responses without clear error messages unless 'safetySettings' are explicitly configured
The JSON payload structure for multi-turn chat ('contents' array) is more rigid than OpenAI's 'messages' format
Free tier usage is used to improve Google products, which may be a data privacy concern for some clients
client_must_provide: Specific Model ID (e.g., gemini-1.5-flash or gemini-1.5-pro)
research_notes: To integrate via HTTP Request node, use POST to 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent'. You must set the Content-Type header to application/json and include the API key in the URL query parameters. The request body requires a specific 'contents' block containing 'parts' and 'text'.

effort_recommendation.rationale: To integrate via HTTP Request node, use POST to 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent'. You must set the Content-Type header to application/json and include the API key in the URL query parameters. The request body requires a specific 'contents' block containing 'parts' and 'text'.
